bead.title: federation: ADR-007 + FEAT-026 frame + FEAT-020/021 amendments
bead.description: Author ADR-007 (Star topology with hybrid push-register/pull-data, ts-net default) and FEAT-026 (federation feature). Amend FEAT-020 (server node state) and FEAT-021 (multi-node dashboard) for the federation contract.
bead.acceptance: 1. ADR-007 authored. 2. FEAT-026 authored. 3. FEAT-020 + FEAT-021 amended. 4. ddx doc audit clean.
